name: Xander Resources Inc.
summary: Xander Resources Inc., a junior mineral resource exploration company, engages in the identification, acquisition, evaluation, exploration, and development of mineral properties. It primarily explores for gold properties. The company holds interests in the Senneville West Property that comprises 80 claims located in Quebec; and the Senneville East Property comprising 62 claims located in Quebec. It also holds 100% interest in the Blue Ribbon Property; and the Senneville South Property located in Quebec. The company also holds an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Bachelor North Property that consists of 35 mineral claims located in Waswanipi, Quebec. Xander Resources Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
